title: 3 Facts About Your Brain

segments.text: Your brain can hold around two and a half million gigabytes of memory.
And it does all of that using less power than a light bulb.
It has about eighty six billion neurons, all firing at the same time.
Your brain feels no pain, because it has no pain receptors of its own.
It stays active even while you sleep, sometimes more than when you are awake.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Your brain runs on 20 watts and feels no pain. You are wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
